Available commands:
  element beat           Create a beat element (storyteller element beat --id <id> --name <name> [--path <project>])
  element character      Create a character element (storyteller element character --id <id> --name <name> [--path <project>])
  element event          Create a event element (storyteller element event --id <id> --name <name> [--path <project>])
  element foreshadowing  Create a foreshadowing element (storyteller element foreshadowing --id <id> --name <name> [--path <project>])
  element intersection   Create a intersection element (storyteller element intersection --id <id> --name <name> [--path <project>])
  element phase          Create a phase element (storyteller element phase --id <id> --name <name> [--path <project>])
  element plot           Create a plot element (storyteller element plot --id <id> --name <name> [--path <project>])
  element setting        Create a setting element (storyteller element setting --id <id> --name <name> [--path <project>])
  element timeline       Create a timeline element (storyteller element timeline --id <id> --name <name> [--path <project>])
  generate               Create a new storyteller project (storyteller generate --name <name> [--path <dir>] [--template basic|novel|screenplay])
  help                   List available commands
  lint                   Run manuscript lint checks
  lint install-hooks     Run manuscript lint checks
  lsp install            Print editor setup for the Go LSP server (storyteller lsp install <nvim|vscode>)
  lsp start              Start the Go LSP server (storyteller lsp start --stdio)
  lsp validate           Validate a manuscript via the detect pipeline
  mcp init               Manage the Go MCP server (storyteller mcp init [--stdio])
  mcp start              Manage the Go MCP server (storyteller mcp start [--stdio])
  meta check             Validate manuscript frontmatter
  migrate                Migrate storyteller projects between breaking schema versions (storyteller migrate plot-rename [--path <project>] [--dry-run|--apply])
  update                 Update project metadata for the Go engine (storyteller update [--path <project>] [--check|--apply])
  version                Show storyteller version
  view character         Display a character entity
  view foreshadowing     Display a foreshadowing entity (storyteller view foreshadowing --id <id> [--path <project>])
  view list              List project entities (storyteller view list --kind <characters|settings|timelines|foreshadowings|plots> [--path <project>])
  view plot              Display a plot entity (storyteller view plot --id <id> [--path <project>])
  view setting           Display a setting entity (storyteller view setting --id <id> [--path <project>])
  view timeline          Display a timeline entity (storyteller view timeline --id <id> [--path <project>])
